fd.title: Best practice management guidelines for fibrous dysplasia/McCune-Albright syndrome
fd.authors: Javaid MK, Boyce A, Appelman-Dijkstra N, Gebhart J, Offiah AC, Bishop N, Loftus J, Hardy R, Cox L, Frangos S, et al.
fd.summary: International consensus management guideline for fibrous dysplasia and McCune-Albright syndrome — diagnosis, imaging, medical and surgical management, surveillance. Endorsed by the FD/MAS International Consortium.

mas.title: Best practice management guidelines for fibrous dysplasia/McCune-Albright syndrome
mas.authors: Javaid MK, Boyce A, Appelman-Dijkstra N, Gebhart J, Offiah AC, Bishop N, Loftus J, Hardy R, Cox L, Frangos S, et al.
mas.summary: Same international consensus as for FD — covers MAS endocrinopathies, café-au-lait surveillance, and skeletal involvement. Endocrine sections specific to MAS.

noonan.title: Noonan syndrome: clinical aspects and molecular pathogenesis (European clinical guideline)
noonan.authors: Roberts AE, Allanson JE, Tartaglia M, Gelb BD
noonan.summary: Foundational clinical review of Noonan syndrome — diagnostic criteria, molecular pathogenesis across the RAS-MAPK pathway (PTPN11/SOS1/RAF1/KRAS/RIT1), cardiology surveillance, growth hormone considerations.
